paragraphs: Achieve the warm glow and heat of a traditional fireplace without the need for a chimney or a gas line. Our electric fireplaces are easy to install and create a cozy, warm ambiance in any room. Explore this page for electric fireplace ideas and inspiration.
Everything you need to know about electric fireplaces, from how they operate to installation options.
Transform your bedroom with the Allusion Platinum electric fireplace and Boyd Buildout Kit. Create a cozy, stylish focal point that’s easy to install and perfect for any season.
We teamed up with “Trending Today” to break five common misconceptions about fireplaces in today’s market.
Get inspired with this DIY install of our most realistic electric fireplace by architect Christine Nickerson.
Find fresh ideas for a floating fireplace shelf, from selecting the perfect mantel material to styling its finishing touches.
Discover how to safely mount a TV above your fireplace using advanced heat management solutions. Create a stylish and functional focal point in your living room.
Explore the captivating outdoor fireplaces from HGTV's "Rock the Block." See how each team uniquely transformed their spaces, inspiring your next backyard makeover.
Find out how an unconventional electric fireplace setup on HGTV's Rock the Block showcases their flexible design possibilities.

Discover the modern allure of electric fireplaces, offering ambiance and warmth without the traditional maintenance. Explore a diverse range of options, from sleek built-ins to versatile inserts, revolutionizing the way homeowners elevate their living spaces.
Discover the world of interior design and home transformation with Cait Pappas at Nest Out West. Get inspired by her DIY projects, Heat & Glo fireplaces, and modern living space designs.
Electric fireplaces offer more than just a cozy glow! Discover their true heating capabilities.
Learn how to DIY one of our most popular electric fireplaces with a trendy mantel kit.

Inception Electric Fireplace: Immerse yourself in the ambiance of a genuine fire encounter as flickering flames dance and LED embers glow, all brought to life by our innovative Digital Spark Technology.
Electric fireplaces are the no-more-excuses solution to cozying your space. But what do you need to know?
Cait Pappas from Nest Out West shares how she made her finished basement more family-friendly and inviting with a fireplace.
When it comes to making over an old, wood-burning fireplace, it doesn’t get easier than installing an electric fireplace insert.
Discover how to give your space the ultimate glow up.
Discover how to give your space the ultimate glow up.
Hunker’s design team shows how our Allusion Platinum electric fireplace added warmth to their great room with an accessible DIY and modern touches.
From contemporary, sleek designs to more traditional looking fireplaces, linear fireplaces offer something for everyone.
Both of these cost-effective electric hearth products can instantly transform a dated or drafty fireplace, but which one is right for your home?
What to know when choosing a recessed electric fireplace, from budget options to luxury looks.
